title: EMERGENCY DIAPER CLOSET - 211info
text: GROWING TOGETHER FAMILY COMMUNITY CENTER EMERGENCY DIAPER CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency diapers, baby formula, and baby wipes. Clients are eligible to visits once per week and each child is eligible for one pack of diapers or one pack of pull-ups. 310 SW H Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-5 Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 10am-2pm, Wednesday/Friday 10am-noon Email (541) 864-0776 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 864-0776 Call or text Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or text for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties Services: Diapers Formula/Baby Food Personal/Grooming Supplies * Infants/Toddlers Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - PLAY GROUPS AND CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GROWING TOGETHER FAMILY COMMUNITY CENTER
